data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of sending digital tickets to clients.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that a digital ticket is sent to the client email/app, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this action has taken place. The linked use case mentions the need for a digital ticket to be sent, yet the prior steps do not include any details or evidence regarding the actual sending of tickets. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence of digital ticket being sent to client email/app.
